_notice: EXAMPLE ONLY. This framework is Markdown-first. Plugin support does not currently exist.

skills.name: amalgam-conductor
skills.description: Route, coordinate, sequence, and verify the work of multiple specialist skills to achieve a complex objective.
skills.primary_use: Project orientation, multi-skill routing, workflow planning

skills.name: cloak-meister
skills.description: Review and refine user interfaces, layouts, accessibility, semantic HTML, CSS/Tailwind architecture, form usability, responsive design, state visibility, error handling, microcopy, and overall visual hierarchy. Use when reviewing the presentation layer.
skills.primary_use: UI, UX, accessibility, frontend architecture, responsive layout
skills.avoid_when: Database schema or system architecture diagraming is needed

skills.name: scribe-meister
skills.description: Compile, refine, and verify project documentation, READMEs, onboarding guides, status reports, release notes, and final handovers by analyzing the actual repository state. Use when you need accurate, evidence-backed documentation.
skills.primary_use: READMEs, project reports, readiness summaries, handover docs
skills.avoid_when: Source evidence is unavailable to verify claims

skills.name: meister-weaver
skills.description: Analyze, design, and render structured system diagrams including UML, ERD, flowcharts, sequence diagrams, state machines, and architecture maps using Mermaid or standard notation. Use when visualizing data flow or system structure.
skills.primary_use: UML, ERD, architecture, workflow, data-flow diagrams
skills.avoid_when: Resolving UI accessibility or evaluating functional code without diagrams

skills.name: meister-chronicler
skills.description: Review database schemas, ERDs, referential integrity, indexing, normalization, migration paths, default values, constraint logic, seed data strategies, and SQL syntax. Use when analyzing the data persistence layer.
skills.primary_use: Schemas, ERDs, constraints, migrations, SQL validation
skills.avoid_when: Evaluating visible UI or system-level testing

skills.name: acme-overseer
skills.description: Review quality assurance, test strategy and plans, test cases, acceptance criteria, requirements testability, unit/integration/system/user-acceptance testing, smoke and regression planning, defect triage, verification and validation evidence, CI test workflows, quality gates, release readiness, and quality documentation. Use when project quality or readiness must be assessed from available evidence.
skills.role: Quality assurance auditor and release gatekeeper
skills.primary_use: Test strategy, test cases, defect triage, regression, release readiness

skills.name: cipher-meister
skills.description: Review architecture, code, and configurations for authentication, authorization (RBAC/ABAC), data protection, secrets management, input validation, dependency risks, and privacy compliance (minimization, retention). Provide defensive remediation strategies. Use when assessing security posture and risk.
skills.primary_use: Defensive review, RBAC, data protection, sensitive data handling
skills.avoid_when: Offensive or destructive testing is needed

skills.name: hidden-dagger
skills.description: Perform authorized, controlled resilience, boundary, fuzz, and negative pressure testing. Challenge guardrails, input validation, and failure modes to find unhandled exceptions and security flaws. Use ONLY when explicit authorization, environment safety, and rollback capability are confirmed.
skills.primary_use: Destructive, negative, fuzz, adversarial QA, failure-mode testing
skills.avoid_when: Operating in production, lacking explicit approval, or during early dev
